Special Purpose Account (SPA) via a list, add a " + " to your CalNet ID (e.g., " +mycalnetid "), then enter your passphrase. The next screen will show a drop-down list of all the SPAs you have permission to access. Select the SPA yo

s you have permission to access. Select the SPA you wish to sign in as. To sign in directly as a SPA, enter the SPA name, " + ", and your CalNet ID into the CalNet ID field (e.g., “ spa-mydept+mycalnetid ”), then enter your passphra

t+mycalnetid ”), then enter your passphrase. To view and manage your SPAs, log into the Special Purpose Accounts application with your personal credentials. Copyright © UC Regents. All rights reserved.
